<!--
Thanks for adding a recipe! A few notes:

- Drop the file in `recipes/` with a name matching its `shortname` (e.g. `recipes/banana_bread.md`).
- Photos go in `recipe_files/` and are referenced by filename under `photos:` in the frontmatter.
- The site rebuilds and deploys automatically on merge to master.
-->
